basic_details.job_title: BIRAC Associate Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: BIRAC Recruitment 2026 OUT! The Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council (BIRAC) has released the notification for recruitment to the post of Associate Consultant [Finance & Accounts]. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online for 1 contractual vacancy under Advt No. BIRAC/VAC/176/Jul-2026_CON.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: CA / ICWA, B. Com with MBA-Finance /PGDM -Finance from a recognized Institute
qualification.details: Associate Consultant [Finance & Accounts]: CA / ICWA or B. Com with MBA-Finance /PGDM -Finance from a recognized Institute.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BIRAC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BIRAC Associate Consultant [Finance & Accounts] Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BIRAC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BIRAC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BIRAC Associate Consultant [Finance & Accounts] Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BIRAC Associate Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Associate Consultant [Finance & Accounts] position is 13th August 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a CA / ICWA or a B. Com degree with an MBA-Finance / PGDM-Finance from a recognized institution to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Associate Consultant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 45 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Associate Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 75,000/- per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Associate Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Associate Consultant [Finance & Accounts] position in the Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the BIRAC Associate Consultant recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Associate Consultant [Finance & Accounts] is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for a position based in Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It contains all detailed information.
